tools.name: projects.clouderrorreportingProjectsDeleteEvents
tools.description: Deletes all error events of a given project.

tools.name: projects.clouderrorreportingProjectsEventsReport
tools.description: Report an individual error event and record the event to a log. This endpoint accepts **either** an OAuth token, **or** an [API key](https://support.google.com/cloud/answer/6158862) for authentication. To use an API key, append it to the URL as the value of a `key` parameter. For example: `POST https://clouderrorreporting.googleapis.com/v1beta1/{projectName}/events:report?key=123ABC456` **Note:** [Error Reporting] (https://cloud.google.com/error-reporting) is a global service built on Cloud Logging and doesn't analyze logs stored in regional log buckets or logs routed to other Google Cloud projects.

tools.name: projects.clouderrorreportingProjectsGroupsUpdate
tools.description: Replace the data for the specified group. Fails if the group does not exist.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
